'''Hogusses''' were sentient beings with heavy bodies. During the [[Border dispute on Ansion/Legends|Mission to Ansion]], sanctioned by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] and conducted by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], a Hoguss wielding a killing ax attacked the two [[Mirialan/Legends|Mirialan]] Jedi at [[Cuipernam]].

{{Species-stub}}
